zh.lifeSummary: 當Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg於1296年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧時，她的父親Johann I von Isenburg-Limburg39歲，母親Uda von Ravensberg28歲。她和Friedrich VI von Leiningen至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1335年在德國享年39歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jutta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Judith  , also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg was born in 1296, in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, her father, Johann I von Isenburg-Limburg, was 39 and her mother, Uda von Ravensberg, was 28. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Friedrich VI von Leiningen. She died in 1335, in Germany, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg est née en 1296, à Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Johann I von Isenburg-Limburg, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Uda von Ravensberg, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Friedrich VI von Leiningen. Elle est décédée en 1335, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 39 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg(이)가 1296년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라h크레이스 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann I von Isenburg-Limburg(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Uda von Ravensberg(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Friedrich VI von Leiningen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 독일에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg родилась в 1296 г. в местности нассау, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Johann I von Isenburg-Limburg было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Uda von Ravensberg, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Friedrich VI von Leiningen. Она умерла в 1335 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 39 лет.
